luminaire_type.description: 100mm diameter recessed LED downlight, prismatic lens

selection_source.citation: CIBSE LG7 §6.2 (recessed downlight typical values; narrow beam) + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 (LLMF maintenance categories)

assumptions: Working plane = floor level (0 mm) for lobby circulation/general lighting per BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3 reception
LLMF=0.88 × LMF=0.95 → MF=0.836 ≈ 0.84 (clean office environment, 6000h design hours, normal indoor maintenance)
30 LED_DOWNLIGHT @ 1000 design lumens each; LLMF already applied to luminaire output (llmf_applied=true)

drawing_notes: All luminaires: 100mm diameter recessed LED downlight, 1000 design lm, 10W, 3000K CCT, CRI ≥ 90
Maintained illuminance: 300 lux per BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3 (reception lobby)
Z1 perimeter (6 luminaires along glazed S entrance wall) on daylight-linked 0-10V dimming
Z2 interior (24 luminaires, 4 row circuits) on occupancy detection with manual override at entrance
All circuits 6A MCB curve B per IET OSG App C lighting standard (60W per circuit << 1104W 80% limit)
Switch SW01: 2-gang at entrance latch side, 1200 mm AFF to centre per BS 7671 §553.1.1
Manual override at SW01 satisfies Approved Doc L (Part L 2021) §6.2 user-control requirement
Lamp efficacy 100 lm/W ≥ Part L 2021 Table 6.2 target 95 lm/W (PASS)

rationale.chat_summary: 8×5 m UK reception lobby — 300 lux target per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3. 30 LED downlights @ 1000 lm in 5×6 grid achieve 302 lux (INV-1 PASS). Z1 perimeter (6 luminaires along glazed entrance wall, daylight-linked dimming) + Z2 interior (24 luminaires, 4 row circuits, occupancy controlled). 2_gang switch at entrance latch side at 1200 mm AFF. Reply to refine, e.g. 'switch to DALI controls'.

sections.title: Lumen-method walk
sections.summary: Area 8 × 5 = 40 m². Hm = 2700 − 0 = 2700 mm (lobby working plane = floor per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3). RI = (8 × 5) / (2.7 × 13) = 40 / 35.1 = 1.14 → ontology table key 1.0. UF=0.48 (LED_DOWNLIGHT ontology at RI=1.0, reflectances 0.7_0.5_0.2 per CIBSE LG7 §6.2). MF = 0.88 × 0.95 = 0.836 ≈ 0.84. N = (300 × 40) / (1000 × 0.48 × 0.84) = 12000 / 403 = 29.77 → round UP to 30. Achieved = 30 × 1000 × 0.48 × 0.84 / 40 = 302.4 lux ≥ 300 target (INV-1 PASS).

decisions.label: Lux target 300 lx maintained
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3 entry for reception_lobby sets 300 lx maintained.
decisions.rule: BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 entry for reception_lobby

decisions.label: 30 luminaires from N=29.77 rounded UP
decisions.summary: Lumen method gives 29.77; round UP to 30 (never under-provide light per [spacing-rules#lumen-method-formula]).

sections.title: S/H ratio enforcement
sections.summary: 30 luminaires in 5×6 grid (5 rows × 6 cols). S_x = (8000 − 600) / 5 = 1480 mm. S_y = (5000 − 600) / 4 = 1100 mm. Hm = 2700 mm. SHR_max = 1.4 (LED_DOWNLIGHT ontology default — narrow beam). Limit = 1.4 × 2700 = 3780 mm. Both PASS (1480 ≤ 3780 ✓; 1100 ≤ 3780 ✓). INV-2 PASS per [spacing-rules#shr-max-default].

sections.title: Part L zoning
sections.summary: Glazed entrance wall (S) → Z1 perimeter zone (6 luminaires within 1500 mm depth) on daylight-linked 0-10V dimming. Z2 interior (24 luminaires) on occupancy detection. controls.required = ['occupancy', 'daylight_linking'] satisfies Approved Doc L (Part L 2021) §6.2 + BS EN 15193-1:2017 §6.2. Lamp efficacy 100 lm/W ≥ Part L Table 6.2 target 95 lm/W (PASS).

decisions.label: Daylight-linked dimming on perimeter zone Z1
decisions.summary: Approved Doc L (Part L 2021) §6.2 requires daylight-linked control where glazing borders the perimeter zone. Z1 = row 0 (6 LED_DOWNLIGHTs at y=300, within 1500 mm of S glazed wall).
decisions.code_clause: Approved Doc L (Part L 2021) § 6.2 + BS EN 15193-1:2017 § 6.2

sections.title: Switch placement
sections.summary: Single primary entrance on S wall. Switch SW01 placed 200 mm inside the room at (2700, 200), 1200 mm AFF to centre per [switching-rules#height] (BS 7671 §553.1.1 + IET OSG App E §E1.2). 2_gang controls Z1 (daylight-linked dimming master) + Z2 (occupancy zone master). Latch side per door_swing=inward_latch_right.

decisions.label: 2-gang switch at S entrance, latch side, 1200 mm AFF
decisions.summary: Approved Doc L 2021 §6.2 requires manual override at entrance for automatic controls. 2-gang gives independent override of perimeter daylight zone vs interior occupancy zone.
decisions.rule: Switch height + latch + Part L manual override
decisions.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 553.1.1 + IET OSG App E §E1.2 + Approved Doc L 2021 § 6.2

sections.title: Circuits
sections.summary: 5 row circuits C-L01..C-L05 on DB L1; one per row (6 luminaires × 10 W = 60 W per circuit). All on 6 A Type B MCBs (60 W << 1104 W 80% limit). row_index 0..4 monotonic; homerun_endpoints all on W wall stacked at the row y. No Z-pattern (INV-4 PASS).

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Reflectances 0.7/0.5/0.2 clean-lobby standard. LLMF already applied to luminaire output (llmf_applied=true). Engineer-of-record must confirm UF + SHR_max against manufacturer photometric file before issue for construction.

decisions.label: MF = 0.84 (LLMF 0.88 × LMF 0.95)
decisions.summary: Clean indoor environment, 6000h design hours, normal maintenance schedule.
decisions.rule: CIBSE TM 3-25 / standard MF for clean indoor LED

invariants.evidence: Lumen method: N=30 LED_DOWNLIGHT × 1000 lm × UF=0.48 × MF=0.84 / 40 m² = achieved_illuminance_lux=302.4 lux ≥ target 300 lux (Rule 1 PASS). Calculation per [spacing-rules#lumen-method-formula] + ontology LED_DOWNLIGHT UF table at RI=1.0 (room RI=1.14, table key 1.0), reflectances 0.7_0.5_0.2.

S/H ratio: Hm=2700 mm, SHR_max=1.4 (LED_DOWNLIGHT ontology default narrow beam), limit=3780 mm. 5 rows × 6 cols grid: S_x=(8000−600)/5=1480 mm ≤ 3780 PASS; S_y=(5000−600)/4=1100 mm ≤ 3780 PASS. Per [spacing-rules#shr-max-default].

Switch coverage: 1 entrance declared (S wall primary), 1 switch emitted (SW01 at (2700, 200), 1200 mm AFF to centre, latch side per door_swing=inward_latch_right). switches.length ≥ entrances.length (Rule 3a PASS). Height per [switching-rules#height] (BS 7671 §553.1.1 + IET OSG App E §E1.2) and latch placement per [switching-rules#latch-side] (Rule 3b PASS).

Circuit topology: 5 row circuits C-L01..C-L05 each feed exactly one row (6 luminaires sharing same y_mm). row_index 0..4 monotonic per circuit; no luminaire spans multiple rows (no Z-pattern daisy-chain). homerun_endpoints all on W wall stacked at each row's y_mm ∈ {300, 1400, 2500, 3600, 4700} — all four required keys (x_mm, y_mm, wall) present, wall ∈ {N,S,E,W}. Rule 4a + 4b PASS per [placement-rules#row-spacing-uniform] + [switching-rules#perimeter-circuit].

Circuit load: each of C-L01..C-L05 has total_load_w=60 W = 6 × 10 W ≤ 0.8 × 6 A × 230 V = 1104 W (6A MCB limit). All five circuits PASS the 80% continuous-load cap per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1.1 + IET OSG App A. 60 W is 5.4% of the 1104 W headroom — ample spare for future luminaire additions.

Part L compliance: is_uk_new_build=true (input.new_build) AND jurisdiction=england_wales triggers Part L 2021 §6 enforcement. controls.required=['occupancy','daylight_linking'] (both PRESENT). controls.lamp_efficacy_lm_per_w=100 ≥ part_l_efficacy_target_lm_per_w=95 (PASS per [control-rules#part-l-efficacy-target] + Approved Doc L Table 6.2). Manual override at SW01 satisfies [control-rules#manual-switch-override]. controls.part_l_compliant=true. Rule 6 PASS.

Zone assignment: 6 luminaires (L01-L06 at y=300) in Z1 perimeter (within 1500 mm of S glazed entrance wall per controls.perimeter_zones); 24 luminaires (L07-L30) in Z2 interior. Glazed wall present → perimeter zone PRESENT (consistency PASS per [switching-rules#perimeter-circuit] iff-clause). Zone control protocols match zone_type: Z1 control=daylight_linked (perimeter), Z2 control=occupancy (interior). Rule 7 PASS per [control-rules#part-l-daylight].
